about.title: About Me
about.headline: Software Engineer | Graduate Student at CMU-Africa | Software Engineering Intern at Flowcode
about.description:
I am a Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend architectures, full-stack systems, and practical AI integrations. I currently work remotely as a Software Engineering Intern for Flowcode, a New York-based technology company, while beginning my graduate studies at Carnegie Mellon University Africa (CMU-Africa).

Over my career, I have developed a diverse portfolio of applications, ranging from desktop administrative software and RESTful backend APIs to real-time communication platforms and hybrid intelligent systems utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs). My experience spans technologies like Java/Spring Boot, Python/FastAPI, Node.js, React, and databases such as PostgreSQL and Oracle. As a PeopleCert-certified project manager, I pair technical engineering with agile delivery practices to build efficient systems.

My goal is to break into the global tech industry and build solutions that address challenges not only in Rwanda, but across Africa and globally. My current opportunity at Flowcode is a key step along this journey, allowing me to apply international engineering standards to solve real-world problems at scale.
about.journeyDesc: My journey in software engineering has been defined by continuous growth across different paradigms. I began by building robust offline desktop applications and administrative databases, gradually expanding into modern web architectures, real-time sync systems, and containerized cloud deployments. Recently, my focus has shifted toward machine learning integration and intelligent computing. Pursuing my graduate degree at CMU-Africa allows me to deepen my expertise in distributed systems, database internals, and advanced computation, preparing me to engineer next-generation solutions at scale.
about.drivesDesc: I am driven by clean code architectures, performance optimization, and solving non-trivial engineering challenges. I enjoy finding elegant solutions to complex constraints—whether that means designing offline-first database synchronization, building real-time peer-to-peer data streams, or optimizing AI queries to reduce latency and infrastructure costs.
about.ctaDesc: I'm always excited to take on new challenges and collaborate on interesting projects. Whether you need a complete web application, API development, or technical consultation, I'm here to help bring your ideas to life with clean, efficient code and innovative solutions.
about.availability: Currently available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Let's discuss how I can help with your next project!

projectDescriptions.1: A comprehensive desktop application built with Java Swing that streamlines student and staff administration. Features secure database integration via MySQL, enabling efficient user management, data retrieval, and administrative workflows. Implements CRUD operations with a user-friendly GUI for enhanced institutional productivity.
projectDescriptions.2: A full-stack real-time auction platform engineered with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL. Delivers seamless bidding experiences for buyers and sellers through RESTful APIs and real-time data synchronization. Features secure user authentication, dynamic bid management, and robust database architecture to ensure transactional integrity and scalability.
projectDescriptions.3: A responsive website showcasing modern front-end development practices. Built with semantic HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript to deliver an elegant user experience. Demonstrates proficiency in responsive design principles, DOM manipulation, and cross-browser compatibility.
projectDescriptions.4: A dynamic weather dashboard application that leverages the OpenWeatherMap API to deliver real-time meteorological data and multi-day forecasts. Built with React JS and styled with Tailwind CSS for a modern, responsive interface. Features location-based weather tracking, interactive UI components, and efficient state management to provide users with accurate and accessible weather information.
projectDescriptions.5: A scalable backend system for amusement park management developed with Node.js and Express.js. Implements RESTful API architecture with PostgreSQL database integration for efficient data persistence. Features robust server-side logic for handling attractions, visitor management, and operational workflows, demonstrating proficiency in asynchronous programming and database design.
projectDescriptions.6: An Android telehealth platform bridging rural Community Health Workers and hospital doctors through real-time WebRTC video consultations, with live patient vital sign sharing during calls. Built in Java with Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Cloud Messaging, Crashlytics), Room Database, Retrofit, WebRTC, and Socket.IO. Follows MVVM architecture with an offline-first design and background synchronization via WorkManager.
projectDescriptions.7: A hybrid intelligent system for the Rwanda Seventh-day Adventist Union providing personalized multilingual devotionals, AI-powered prayer sentiment analysis, and smart content recommendations. Combines traditional ML (TF-IDF, cosine similarity with scikit-learn) and Google Gemini AI. Built with Python FastAPI, Spring Boot, React/Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, and Docker. Features an intelligent caching system achieving 70% cost reduction, MVVM-inspired separation, offline capability, and full API documentation. Deployed to Railway.
